CREATE TABLE dates_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, dt DATE);
INSERT INTO dates_table VALUES (1, DATE '2020-01-01');
INSERT INTO dates_table VALUES (2, DATE '1999-12-31');
INSERT INTO dates_table VALUES (3, DATE '2021-07-15');
INSERT INTO dates_table VALUES (4, DATE '2000-02-29');
INSERT INTO dates_table VALUES (5, DATE '1965-05-15');
SELECT year(dt) FROM dates_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT year(dt) FROM dates_table WHERE id = 2;
SELECT year(dt) FROM dates_table WHERE id = 3;
SELECT year(dt) FROM (SELECT year(dt) AS extracted_year FROM dates_table WHERE dt < DATE '2021-01-01') AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE timestamps_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, ts TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO timestamps_table VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2020-01-01 12:00:00');
INSERT INTO timestamps_table VALUES (2, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01 00:00:00');
INSERT INTO timestamps_table VALUES (3, TIMESTAMP '2023-03-22 15:30:45');
SELECT year(ts) FROM timestamps_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT year(ts) FROM timestamps_table WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT year(ts) FROM (SELECT ts FROM timestamps_table WHERE id = 3) AS nested_query;
CREATE TABLE combined_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, dt DATE, ts TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO combined_table VALUES (1, DATE '2020-03-22', TIMESTAMP '2020-03-22 10:00:00');
SELECT (SELECT year(dt) FROM combined_table WHERE id = 1) AS year_date, (SELECT year(ts) FROM combined_table WHERE id = 1) AS year_timestamp;
SELECT c.id, year(c.dt) AS year_date, year(c.ts) AS year_timestamp FROM combined_table c WHERE c.id BETWEEN 1 AND 1;
CREATE TABLE interval_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, mi INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO interval_table VALUES (1, INTERVAL '1 year');
SELECT year(mi) FROM interval_table WHERE id = 1;
